title: henckelia corneri
intro: Henckelia corneri, also known as Toothache Plant, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Henckelia corneri have been found to provide relief from toothaches, headaches, and other painful conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are applied topically to the affected area to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
